Text.text: We collect organization setup information, administrator email addresses, operational logs, lead attributes (name, phone, email, status, and source), activity entries (call notes, email logs, and SMS metadata), and details regarding marketing offers and discount configurations.

We use this data solely to provide, operate, and maintain the LMA services, process authentication requests, validate regional address boundaries, synchronize realtime socket events, and enable managers to oversee executive follow-up operations.

We implement database-level partitioning to ensure that organization-specific leads, activities, and configurations are only accessible to authorized members within that organization. We utilize encryption, access control tokens, and regular auditing logs to prevent unauthorized access.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the effective date.
